Home Make a Submission?

E-Z Key Lime Pie

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield: 6 servings

Ingredients

1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk 1/2 cup Key Lime Juice (Nellie & Joe’s) 8 oz. Cool Whip Graham Cracker Pie Crust

Directions

Blend all together & dump into pie crust. Refrigerate.
